Frontier-orbital calculation on aniline (C₆H₅NH₂, 14 atoms) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard', density-fit RKS) in PySCF. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell singlet). Geometry: user-supplied fixed .xyz (single-point; geometry not relaxed at this level). SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings reported — clean run. Integrity check: trustworthy = true, all checks passed.

Headline result: HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.3048177 eV (Koopmans-style orbital gap).

Total energy: −287.71578 Hartree (−7829.1453 eV). 25 occupied orbitals; 259 total basis functions.
